Hurricanes, floods and logistics disruptions create expensive coordination lag across hotels, ports, clinics, insurers, NGOs and emergency teams. A deployable agentic network can compress hours of calls into verified decisions, owners, ETAs and stakeholder briefs.","real_world_problem":"During hurricanes, floods and port disruptions, critical operators coordinate through calls, WhatsApp threads, email and spreadsheets. The region is not small; it is fragmented. The economic drag is the gap between when a decision should happen and when it actually clears across agencies, suppliers, hotels, ports and funders.","proposed_solution":"Caribbean T0 Resilience Network is an agentic coordination layer for climate and disaster operations. It ingests public advisories, partner updates, inventories and requests; normalizes them into incident events; scores urgency and economic drag; creates owner-led tasks with evidence; and drafts briefs that stay behind human approval gates. The demo shows the cockpit, agent trace, impact economics and paid-pilot deal room.","why_it_matters":"Reducing coordination time protects lives, tourism revenue, medical continuity, donor trust and regional economic resilience. If the Caribbean can compress disaster coordination from hours to minutes, the same operating model can become exportable infrastructure for other island and emerging markets.","five_year_vision":"In five years, Caribbean T0 Resilience Network can become the trusted coordination fabric for Caribbean resilience: a SaaS and deployment network used by hotels, ports, insurers, utilities, NGOs, donors and emergency operators to clear decisions faster across fragmented markets.","applying_as":"Solo","team_name":"Caribbean T0 Resilience Network","team_members_roles":"","team_matching":"Yes","teammate_types":"Caribbean emergency operations advisor, disaster logistics operator, GIS/data engineer and partnership lead.","international_collab":"Yes","continue_after":"Yes","tools_planned":"Open-source agentic workflows, OpenClaw-compatible orchestration concepts, Vlang services, Vue cockpit, public weather/map feeds, messaging/email connectors, vector search and LLM APIs.","tools_experience":"Open-source AI frameworks, multi-agent systems, LLM orchestration, APIs, cloud infrastructure, vector search and deployment systems.","compute_needed":"Yes","compute_intensity":"Medium","external_datasets":"Yes","dataset_details":"Initial build uses public and non-sensitive data: National Hurricane Center advisories, public weather feeds, open map layers, public port or airport status where available and synthetic partner inventories.","sensitive_data":"No","sensitive_data_details":"The demo avoids sensitive or private data.
